facebook.caption: POV: you skipped the crowded south coast and booked Ông Lang instead. Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc sits right on one of the quieter stretches of the island. 4.7 stars across 3,037 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Beach access, spa, pool. Fewer selfie-stick crowds. More actual rest. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
